_note: Updated daily at noon by the orchestrator. Synthesised from all agent statuses. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Room editor overhaul — new inspector panel and fixing confusing mode switching
priorities.note: Engineering and design are working on this together. Engineering is rebuilding the side panel; design is fixing the place-vs-select confusion. These need to land at the same time.

priorities.title: Adding version numbers to saved room files — must happen before any format changes
priorities.note: Without version numbers, any change to how rooms are saved could silently break old files. Needs founder sign-off to proceed.

priorities.title: Connecting the AI image generator to the sprite editor
priorities.note: The server side is done. The editor interface for generating sprites is still being built.

priorities.title: Writing down the animation and AI panel rules so all tools stay consistent
priorities.note: Without these documented, every new feature risks looking slightly different from the last. Quick win with high ongoing value.

priorities.title: Accessibility pass on the new inspector and side panels
priorities.note: Keyboard navigation and visible focus states on everything being built in the room editor.

priorities.title: Decide when to test the newer AI model for room layout suggestions
priorities.note: A newer model may be meaningfully better. We need a founder decision on when to run the test.

risks_p1.title: Saved room files have no version number
risks_p1.note: Any change to the room format could silently break old saves. Needs fixing before the next format change ships.

founder_decisions.title: Sign off on adding version numbers to saved room files
founder_decisions.note: This blocks room editor entity additions and any future format changes.

founder_decisions.title: When should we test the newer AI room assistant model?
founder_decisions.note: We need a time-boxed evaluation. When should it happen, and what does 'good enough to switch' look like?
